name: Jarvis Starter Automation Pack
description: Local-first beginner workflow nodes and templates for personal productivity automations.
author: Jarvis Core

permissions.reason: List starter templates and explain required setup before activation.
Support local file watcher and document ingestion template nodes.
Allow approved workflows to save summaries into local memory or notes.

metadata.description: Watches a configured folder and emits file-created events.
Summarizes text with the active local or routed AI provider.
Shows beginner-friendly automations with one-click setup.
